name: Cappuccino Cupcakes
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Baking Butter, Mrs. Bateman's Butterlike (or prune puree)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Lightly coat 18 standard-size muffin cups with nonstick cooking spray.
3. Dissolve espresso powder in warm water and set aside.
4. In a small bowl, whisk together flour, sugar, cocoa powder, baking powder, and salt.
5. In a large bowl, stir together Mrs. Bateman's Butterlike (or prune puree), oil, eggs, dissolved espresso, and vanilla.
6. Stir in the flour mixture just until blended.
7. Spoon batter evenly into prepared muffin cups, filling each cup about halfway full.
8. Bake for 17 to 20 minutes or until tops spring back when lightly touched.
9. Cool cupcakes in pan for 3 minutes. Turn out onto a wire rack to cool completely.
10. Just before serving, frost each cupcake with a tablespoonful of whipped topping.
11. Frost with cocoa powder through a fine-mesh sieve.
